description: An accessibility user has dumped all their voice commands into a single monolithic file at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\everything.talon, causing context conflicts. Refactor this file by distributing its contents into a new directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\refactored\ containing five files: global.talon for global and formatting commands; browser.talon with a context header restricting it to Firefox or Chrome; notepad.talon with a context header restricting it to Notepad; custom_actions.py containing the Python module actions with necessary Talon imports and action classes; and symbols.talon-list containing the symbol list with the required list declaration header. Ensure all original voice commands are preserved in the new structure and rename or delete the original everything.talon file to prevent it from loading.
